summary: Raised Claude provider output capacity by replacing the hard-coded max_tokens=1024 with configurable CLAUDE_MAX_TOKENS=4096. ClaudeProvider now accepts an optional max_tokens constructor argument and passes self._max_tokens to Anthropic messages.create. Added tests for the default 4096 cap and a custom 2048 cap. This fixed truncated Claude synthesis artifacts while keeping provider configuration code-level and non-secret. Full suite passed with 225 tests at commit time.
